default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Usman and Jo to discuss content production, workflow updates, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content OS needs updating with topic clusters, Google Doc links, and status changes](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [New workflow for Smith AI content refreshes implemented; internal review needed before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Usman to deliver 3 refreshed articles by tomorrow, with 2 new articles to follow](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Updates needed for Exec Standards and Processes Canva, including publishing guide](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline and OS Updates

  - [Three items currently in "reviewing" status](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [New division: internal vs. external review](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Action items for Usman:](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
      - [Add missing topic clusters with descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
      - [Categorize topics into clusters (refer to content strategy doc)](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
      - [Maintain Google Doc links, meta titles/descriptions, and cover images](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Update published URLs and dates](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Content Audit and PSU Articles

  - [PSU (presumably Product-Specific Update) articles often rank high for long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Process for updating PSU articles:](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Check main keyword and US SERP ranking using Ahrefs plugin](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [If ranking 1st, tag as "keep"](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [If not in top 3, consider optimizing (expand content, improve examples, add benefits)](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Smith AI Refresh Project

  - [New agentic workflow implemented for content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [FAQ generation discrepancy noted between stages](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Internal review needed before publishing; no tickets to be filed for Suleiman yet](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Usman to update Content OS with topics in production](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)

### Call Design Flow Strategy

  - [New ticket coming for Usman: habit-spoke structure](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [One 5,000-word pillar page + multiple smaller spoke pages](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Usman to upload to Content OS when ticket is received](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### Content Production Schedule

  - [5 items in production this week (3 refreshes, 2 new articles)](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Usman commits to delivering 3 refreshed articles by tomorrow morning](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)

### Workflow and Process Updates

  - [Weekly content generation task automatically updates](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Activity tab to manage all reviews](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Exec Standards and Processes Canva to be updated with publishing guide](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Usman to update Content OS with topic clusters and Google Doc links](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Deliver 3 refreshed articles by tomorrow morning](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Update Exec Standards and Processes Canva with publishing guide](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Jo to prepare additional tickets for Usman (including Call Design Flow strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Continue content audit and production as per discussed schedule](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Maintain communication via Slack for urgent matters](https://fathom.video/share/AJD9deGqkNisA-z4z_a2bt-w3E-5xsxz?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)

action_items.description: Add topic clusters to contentOS, categorize topics into clusters
Add Google Doc links for reviewing & in-production content to contentOS
File ticket for Suleiman to update reviewed articles, tag Jo
Update contentOS with Smith AI refreshes in production
Write ticket for Usman re: call design flow strategy, upload to contentOS
Add exec publishing guide to Exact Standards and Processes Canva in Slack
Prepare & assign new tickets for Usman in project management system
